---
title: "Robert Mullins"

about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/me.png
  links: # create buttons
    - icon: linkedin 
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/robert-mullins-176006319/
      target: _blank
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/robert-mullins
      target: _blank
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:robertdavmullins@gmail.com
---

## Welcome to my ePortfolio!

I'm a fourth-year Business Studies International student at Dublin City University.
Here, you can find a collection of my skills, academic projects and experiences. 
Do feel free to reach out to me on Linkedin or by email if you have any questions!

You can find out more [about me here.](about.qmd)

Alternatively, feel free to take a look at my [projects here.](projects/)
